content.en:
Ancient Abyss Realm.

The Shadow Elder was following a Demon Venerable, who was much stronger than him, but the Shadow Elder could make the other party unable to perceive him.

It's just because he has an innate primordial treasure on his body-Shadowless Leaf.

This innate primordial treasure is very special, it doesn't have the ability to fight, maybe he hasn't developed it yet, but he has developed an ability, that is, to use the Shadowless Leaf to transcend the void time and space and all the rules.

Even face to face, it is impossible to perceive his presence.

However, he can't do it, and once he does, he can't hide it.

In addition, this kind of snooping also has a time limit, so he can't hide for a long time, and a powerful attack will also expose him.

All in all, it's a bit of a chicken rib, but it's useful at critical moments.

For example, now, he is following this Demon Venerable.

"This Demon Venerable must go to the Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree, follow him, and you can find the location of the Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree!" said the Xuanying Patriarch secretly.

After a while, this Demon Venerable had already arrived at the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree.

Elder Xuanying immediately informed the other elders of the location of this place.

The Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree can move, although it is not fast, but its strength is still very strong, and it has been fleeing.

And the Demon Venerables struck one after another, wanting to kill the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree and take away its Ancient Abyss Fruit.

However, the Demon Venerables were also worried that they would destroy the Gu Yuan Fruit, so they were a little afraid when attacking, resulting in not taking down the Gu Yuan Realm Tree for a while.

......

Ye Tian also received the news, and he was also rushing towards the side of the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree.

After some time, Ye Tian met Soho and other elders.

At this time, they had already come to the area of the Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree, and found those Demon Venerables and the Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree.

However, they did not do it immediately, but waited for the other patriarchs to arrive before they were ready to do it.

Soon, other patriarchs arrived, but there were still a few less.

"Those elders have fallen, they have to do it, the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree can't bear it! Once they take the Ancient Abyss Realm, it will be difficult to destroy it!"

The one who spoke was the elder of the ancient desert, the elder of the ancient clan, who was very powerful, and he was also the most powerful of this group of elders.

"Who's going to destroy the Gu Yuan Fruit?"

Elder Xuanying asked.

"I'll go!" Ye Tian said.

"Ye Tian, your strength is not enough to destroy the Gu Yuan Fruit, this is not a joke!" said one of the patriarchs.

Then.

Ye Tian showed a supreme legendary body of a consummation realm, and the first sequence of supreme dao rules were permeated on his body.

"What, the first sequence of the rules of the Tao !!!"

Many elders were shocked, even Soho was shocked, she didn't know that Ye Tian had comprehended the rules of the first sequence of supreme paths.

"I dare to sacrifice my clone, I am the most suitable person!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The other patriarchs had no opinion.

Soon.

They shuttled through.

......

The Demon Venerables had long known that this group of Patriarchs was coming, but as long as they didn't hinder themselves, they wouldn't have divided the Demon Venerables to attack this group of Elders.

But now, when the patriarchs are coming, they must be stopped.

"Divide a part of the Demon Venerable to stop them!"

Xuanyi Demon Venerable ordered.

The Xuanyi Demon Venerable was the most powerful of this group of Demon Venerables, and the other Demon Venerables obeyed his orders.

Immediately, the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable and the others went to intercept the patriarchs.

Ye Tian's two copy bodies went to destroy Gu Yuanguo, and his copy body was responsible for dealing with these Demon Venerables, after all, he alone was equivalent to six elders, so he could make up for the dilemma of lack of combat power.

"It's you again!"

When the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable saw Ye Tian, he was furious, and he was ready to kill Ye Tian's clone again.

However, as soon as they fought, he was confused.

Rumble!!!!!

The Nine Xuan Demon Venerable was stabbed by Ye Tian's shot, and was directly shocked and flew out.

"Your strength ......"

The Nine Xuan Demon Venerable was a little incredulous.

Before, Ye Tian was not his opponent at all, but his defense was strong, and he was finally killed by him.

As a result, now, Ye Tian's attacks have skyrocketed.

"How could Ye Tian suddenly comprehend the first-order supreme path rules?Could it be that he found a first-order supreme path rule item above the high-quality level, and took advantage of this time to comprehend the first-sequence supreme path rule??? this is too lucky!"

He couldn't think of anything else besides that.

At this time, Ye Tian's duplicate body was burning the origin and fighting, fighting frantically.

A weaker Demon Venerable tried to intercept Ye Tian, but was directly killed by Ye Tian and killed in a short time.

And in such a big battle, the death of a Demon Venerable will not cause any waves at all.

Ye Tian's other two duplicate bodies also came to the Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree, the Demon Venerables knew Ye Tian's purpose, and naturally did not dare to let Ye Tian get close to the Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree, what if Ye Tian really came into contact with the Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree and destroyed the Ancient Abyss Fruit at all costs?

At this time.

Xuanyi Demon Venerable took matters into his own hands and prepared to kill Ye Tian.

However.

Xuanyi Demon Venerable was quickly shocked, he attacked Ye Tian, but he didn't expect to be found by Ye Tian at the weakest point, withstood his attack with the least damage, and blocked it stubbornly.

Immediately afterwards, he kept attacking Ye Tian, but he couldn't seriously damage Ye Tian, and although Ye Tian's attack couldn't hurt him, it caused him a little trouble.

"Innate Primordial Treasure!"

Xuanyi Demon Venerable saw a clue by observing Ye Tian's eyes.

This must be an innate original treasure!

The Xuanyi Demon Venerable could only intercept one of Ye Tian's copy bodies, and the other copy body had already killed the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree from the other side.

"Stop him!"

Xuanyi Demon Venerable roared.

However.

The two Demon Venerables couldn't stop Ye Tian, and Ye Tian, who was behind the Burning Origin, was beaten hard.

Then.

He had come to the Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree.

Immediately, at all costs, he rushed towards the Gu Yuan Fruit on the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree.

No matter how the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree attacked him, he ignored it, and only thought about destroying the Ancient Abyss Fruit.

Rumble!!!!!

The first sequence of supreme rules turned into countless attack threads, killing Gu Yuanguo.

Under the attack again and again, the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree was not able to stop it after all, and a silk thread of light formed by the first sequence of supreme Dao rules ran through the Gu Yuan Fruit.

Suddenly, the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree screamed.

But just one blow still couldn't completely destroy the Gu Yuan Fruit.

Ye Tian attacked desperately again, causing Gu Yuanguo to be constantly destroyed.

At this time.

The Xuanyi Demon Venerable and they were all crazy, and they all wanted to stop Ye Tian, but the other elders and Ye Tian's other copy bodies were all fighting for their lives!

Finally.

Under the gaze of many Demon Venerables and Patriarchs, this Gu Yuan Fruit was destroyed and turned into countless fragments.

Ye Tian snatched some fragments and fled, these fragments should also be of some use.

The other Demon Venerables were also snatching the fragments, and the fragments should also be useful, but they definitely couldn't make the Demon Gu break through.

"Rob!"

The other patriarchs were not idle, and participated in the robbery.
